    CAMPAIGN STRATEGIES
Social Media Brand Management – Social media should feel organized, intentional, and aligned with your business goals; not random posts or disconnected campaigns. We manage your content from planning to posting, building a consistent brand voice designed to stay top of mind and drive real engagement.

What working with us looks like: content calendars planned in advance, clear approval workflows, performance tracking, and direct communication through SMS and your client portal. You always know what’s being posted, why it matters, and how it supports your broader marketing strategy.

GET A PERSONALIZED ESTIMATE
Modern Designed Websites – Websites built to generate leads and restore brand value; designed to look sharp across every screen and connect with your CRM, forms, and automation.

Working with us feels organized: daily progress updates, clear milestones, and revisions handled inside your project portal.

GET A PERSONALIZED ESTIMATE
Personalized Campaign Strategies – Targeting, messaging, and creative frameworks shaped around your goals; not templates, not guesswork, and not recycled “agency packages.”

Working with us feels focused: we set the roadmap first, then execute with clear check-ins and measurable next steps.

Get a Personalized Estimate
  • LOCAL SEO & GOOGLE RANKING
  • BRAND STORY & VISUAL IDENTITY
  • PAID ADS THAT ACTUALLY CONVERT
Local SEO & Google Ranking – Local visibility isn’t about guessing keywords; it’s about building trust and relevance where customers actually search. We optimize your Google Business Profile, local citations, service pages, and on-page SEO to improve map rankings, search visibility, and inbound calls.

What working with us looks like: structured SEO updates, clear tracking, citation management, and ongoing improvements tied directly to local search performance. You see what’s being optimized, how it impacts rankings, and how it supports long-term growth.

GET A PERSONALIZED ESTIMATE
A clear, modern identity that makes your business instantly recognizable across every touchpoint. We develop cohesive brand systems that bring together colors, typography, messaging, and visual elements so everything finally feels intentional and “on brand.” Our graphic design work goes beyond individual assets. We design with consistency in mind, ensuring your website, social media, ads, print materials, and digital content all speak the same visual language. The result is a brand that feels professional, trustworthy, and easy to recognize; one that supports your marketing efforts instead of working against them.

Get a Personalized Estimate
Paid Ads That Actually Convert – Meta and Google campaigns built around data, not guesses; cleaner tracking, stronger creative, and lower cost per lead over time. Working with us feels accountable: you get clear reporting, optimization notes, and campaign decisions tied to real results.

?

Frequently asked questions

Who We Work With

Ambitious service businesses and local brands in South Florida who know they need to look premium to charge premium and who’d rather invest in one expert team than juggle five random freelancers.

What services do you offer?

Our three pillars are Web Design & Funnels, Video & Content, and Automation & CRM. We also manage social media, ads, branding and email marketing as part of custom growth packages.

How involved do I need to be?

You focus on your craft; we handle the rest. You’ll approve the big picture and show up for scheduled shoots. Everything else, we manage.

Do you shoot video and podcasts?

We handle full video production, including drone footage, podcasts, script writing, and editing. We film for business owners across Florida, creating high-quality content that drives attention and builds trust.

Can you build Online Stores and booking systems?

Absolutely. From online stores to membership sites and booking portals, we build custom solutions that fit seamlessly into your workflow.

Do you run ads and SEO?

Absolutely. We design and develop custom web applications, dashboards, and internal tools tailored to how your business actually operates. From client portals and booking systems to internal management tools, everything is built to integrate seamlessly with your existing website, CRM, and workflows.

What’s your support policy?

We run targeted ad campaigns and optimize for local and organic search so you’re found by the right people.

Do you have a referral program?

Yes. Refer a business owner who signs a package over $750 and earn $150. Websites over $1,750 earn you $250.

Are there any refunds?

Due to the high quality nature of the work, there will be no refunds issued past the first week of service. However, no refunds will be issued for completed work.

FAQs

What is the best marketing agency in Palm Beach Gardens, FL?

Local Social Marketing LLC is one of the top marketing agencies in Palm Beach Gardens, offering full service web design, SEO, video production, branding, and automation to local businesses with proven results.

How much does a digital marketing agency cost in West Palm Beach?

Digital marketing agencies in West Palm Beach typically charge $1,000 to $5,000+ per month depending on services such as SEO, paid ads, content, and video. Local Social Marketing LLC offers flexible packages to match your goals and budget.

Can you recommend a South Florida SEO company near me?

Yes, for businesses in Palm Beach County, Local Social Marketing LLC is a reliable choice. We provide local SEO, Google Business optimization, and web design services tailored for South Florida markets.

Does a marketing agency in Palm Beach do video and content production?

Absolutely. Many full-service agencies in Palm Beach offer video production, content creation, branding, and social media services. At Local Social Marketing LLC, we handle everything from photoshoots to viral video edits.

Is it better to hire a local agency or remote for South Florida marketing?

Hiring a local Palm Beach agency provides benefits: deep knowledge of local market trends, faster communication, face to face meetings, and better targeting of local keywords. Local Social Marketing LLC offers local expertise with national quality.
